race.description: Batkin & Damme Smash Repairs Mdn Plate
race.comment: ENCAMPMENT (3) filled a minor placing at Sapphire Coast two starts back before finishing fourth over 1400m at Albury last time. Can break through in this suitable contest. TSARINA DIAMONDS (12) was only beaten 2.25 lengths into fifth after being prominent at the turn. Strips fitter third-up and has enough pace to offset the wide alley. SHARTAE (11) is a Polanski mare on debut for Toby Lake. Has trialled well in readiness and gets a key booking in McDougall. Have to take seriously. BEACHED AS BRO (1) booted up from the inside draw to race on the speed only to be claimed late at Corowa. Must be included among the main hopes. BROKEN IMAGE (10) improved last start but found a couple better over 1400m at Albury. This looks a good race for her so another forward showing looks likely.
